allow: Bash(gemini -p "Search for detailed information about UK REACH registration number UK-01-9638319484-0-XXXX for HVO \(Hydrotreated Vegetable Oil\), CAS 700-571-2. I need to find: 1\) Whether this is a valid active registration, 2\) The lead registrant company name, 3\) The tonnage band covered by this registration, 4\) Any consortium arrangements, 5\) Official UK HSE or ECHA documentation confirming this registration. Please focus on authoritative UK government sources and official REACH databases.")
